title: generate systemd: add network dependencies
body:
Add network dependencies to generated systemd services to allow for
enabling them at system startup and have a working network if needed.

Fixes: #4130
Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

Note that this will allow the services to be enabled and start at system boot. `networ-online.target` is sufficient (at least for root). Will further investigate rootless.

@baude @giuseppe PTAL
